output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?label ; wdt:P31 wd:Q2220049 ; wdt:P1812 ?winner .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en" && regex(STR(?label) , "royal rumble" , "i"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?event)
LIMIT 1
